testcase.name: test_admin_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'admin@ssnc.com' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe30b3e26480>('email') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe30b3e26480> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe30b3e26280>('admin', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe30b3e26280> = {'role': 'admin', 'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbi0wMDEiLCJyb2xlIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJleHAiOjE3NzY2MDI1MjcsImVtYWlsIjoiYWRtaW5Ac3NuYy5jb20ifQ.tvzTBn68BF8cRIpW_3y-ETyn1dQfF0llBi-YYBRdVLk', 'user': {'email': 'admin@ssnc.com', 'id': 'admin-001'}}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_health.py:33: in test_admin_login_success assert data.get("admin", {}).get("email") == ADMIN_EMAIL E AssertionError: assert None == 'admin@ssnc.com' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe30b3e26480>('email') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe30b3e26480> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe30b3e26280>('admin', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe30b3e26280> = {'role': 'admin', 'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbi0wMDEiLCJyb2xlIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJleHAiOjE3NzY2MDI1MjcsImVtYWlsIjoiYWRtaW5Ac3NuYy5jb20ifQ.tvzTBn68BF8cRIpW_3y-ETyn1dQfF0llBi-YYBRdVLk', 'user': {'email': 'admin@ssnc.com', 'id': 'admin-001'}}.get

testcase.name: test_admin_login_invalid_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 400 assert 400 in [401, 403] + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_health.py:43: in test_admin_login_invalid_credentials assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 400 E assert 400 in [401, 403] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_user_login_invalid

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 400 assert 400 in [401, 403, 404] + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_health.py:252: in test_user_login_invalid assert response.status_code in [401, 403, 404], f"Expected auth error, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 400 E assert 400 in [401, 403, 404] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
